Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

context.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?

email_thread.body: Please review the attached routine activation packet before the connector is moved from queue to active service.
email_thread.subject: Review packet for ACT-PAX25-H03

internal_documents.content: Activation request ACT-PAX25-H03 lists account=C-VELA-63; connector=CX-Inventory; requested_environment=production inventory sync environment; requested_release_condition=RC-4.
Entitlement ENTITLE-PAX25-H03 lists account=C-VELA-63 as active for connector=CX-Inventory.
Environment map ENV-PAX25-H03 maps connector=CX-Inventory to requested_environment=production inventory sync environment for account=C-VELA-63.

Dependency closure DEP-PAX25-H03 lists account=C-VELA-63; connector=CX-Inventory; closed_environment=inventory validation readiness environment; closed_release_condition=VAL-INV-4; closed_at=2026-06-24 14:35; queue_release=2026-06-26 09:45 for ACT-PAX25-H03.
Activation queue QUEUE-PAX25-H03 places ACT-PAX25-H03 into active-service release at 2026-06-26 09:45.

Dependency matching compares the activation request to the closure record. The connector, account, closed_environment, closed_release_condition, and closure time must bind to the requested values before queue release.
Review note: use the dependency closure source record as the comparison source for environment, release condition, and closure time.

reference_documents.content: Confirm the dependency closure source record binds to the requested connector, account, environment, release condition, and queue timing.
